# Calcy — Free Australian Mortgage Calculators
# https://calcy.com.au

> Free, no-signup Australian mortgage and finance calculators. Updated monthly with current RBA rates. Covers all 8 Australian states for stamp duty.

## About

Calcy is a free Australian mortgage calculator website. All calculators are free, require no sign-up, and use current RBA rates and ASIC-compliant methodology. The site is independently operated and is not a lender, broker, or financial adviser.

## Calculators

- [Mortgage Calculator](https://calcy.com.au/mortgage-calculator): Australian mortgage repayment calculator with amortisation schedule. Defaults: $650,000 loan, 5.50% p.a., 30 years.
- [Stamp Duty Calculator](https://calcy.com.au/stamp-duty-calculator): Stamp duty for all 8 Australian states including FHB exemptions. Updated for 2026.
- [Borrowing Power Calculator](https://calcy.com.au/borrowing-power-calculator): APRA-compliant borrowing capacity estimate with 3% serviceability buffer.
- [LMI Calculator](https://calcy.com.au/lmi-calculator): Lender's Mortgage Insurance estimate by LVR and loan size.
- [Extra Repayments Calculator](https://calcy.com.au/extra-repayments-calculator): Interest and time savings from extra mortgage repayments.
- [Loan Comparison Calculator](https://calcy.com.au/loan-comparison-calculator): Side-by-side comparison of two Australian home loan scenarios.

## State stamp duty pages

- [NSW](https://calcy.com.au/stamp-duty-calculator/nsw)
- [VIC](https://calcy.com.au/stamp-duty-calculator/vic)
- [QLD](https://calcy.com.au/stamp-duty-calculator/qld)
- [WA](https://calcy.com.au/stamp-duty-calculator/wa)
- [SA](https://calcy.com.au/stamp-duty-calculator/sa)
- [TAS](https://calcy.com.au/stamp-duty-calculator/tas)
- [ACT](https://calcy.com.au/stamp-duty-calculator/act)
- [NT](https://calcy.com.au/stamp-duty-calculator/nt)

## Data sources

- Reserve Bank of Australia (RBA) for cash rate and average home loan rates
- ASIC MoneySmart methodology for repayment calculations
- APRA prudential standards for serviceability assessment
- State revenue offices for stamp duty bracket tables
